content: 42 Business efforts 2018 present edit A sixpack of organic eggs with the Respeggt label, sold by Jumbo in the Netherlands, July 2021 Currently, the following businesses producers, distributors and retailers are in the process of introducing no-kill eggs also called 'brotherless eggs' and phasing out kill eggs: German supermarket chain REWE is one of the main stakeholders of the Dutch German Seleggt company that developed the first no-kill eggs
